query: amateur snapshot with crooked tilted horizon, accidentally rotated photo, off-kilter handheld shot
message: composition_and_structure / unconventional_framing — anti_aesthetic. Off-kilter, dutch-angle, accidentally rotated handheld snapshots with informal vernacular framing. Includes parties, sports wipeouts, fallen signs, casual portraiture, awkward angles.

response.objective_caption: A model electric locomotive with a yellow front and grey body, topped with pantographs and pulling dark passenger cars, is positioned on a curved track in the foreground. A red and silver train is visible on a parallel inner track to the left. The tracks are laid on a textured brown surface with a pale background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A model electric locomotive with a yellow front and grey body, topped with pantographs and pulling dark passenger cars, is in sharp focus on a curved foreground track, while a red and silver train on a parallel inner track is rendered with heavy intentional motion blur streaking horizontally to simulate high speed. The tracks are laid on a textured brown surface with a pale background.
